creator: Rebecca Bellan
title: (No AI) OpenAI acquires TBPN, the buzzy founder-led business talk show
dc:creator: Rebecca Bellan
content: TBPN, Silicon Valley's cult-favorite tech podcast, will operate independently, even as it's overseen by chief political operative Chris Lehane.
contentSnippet: TBPN, Silicon Valley's cult-favorite tech podcast, will operate independently, even as it's overseen by chief political operative Chris Lehane.

creator: Rebecca Szkutak
title: (No AI) Microsoft takes on AI rivals with three new foundational models

content: MAI released models that can transcribe voice into text as well as generate audio and images after the group's formation six months ago.

title: (No AI) Apple’s best product ever
author: David Pierce
content:
![](https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/04/VRG_VST_0402_Site.jpg?quality=90&strip=all&crop=0,0,100,100)

All week, we've been asking you to help us rank the 50 best products Apple ever made, as we mark [the company's 50th anniversary](https://www.theverge.com/tech/901418/apple-history-photos). Thanks to everyone who pitched in - we ended up with more than 1.6 million votes! We also have [lots of other coverage of Apple's first half century](https://www.theverge.com/tech/899623/apple-50-anniversary), and you should check it all out. All those votes later, we have some answers. And some thoughts.

![](https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2025/11/Vergecast-Tile-Large.jpeg?quality=90&strip=all&crop=0,0,100,100)

_Verge_ subscribers, don't forget you get exclusive access to ad-free _Vergecast_ wherever you get your podcasts. Head [here](https://www.theverge.com/account/podcasts). Not a subscriber? You can [sign up here](https://www.theverge.com/subscribe).

On [this episode of _The Vergecast_](https://pod.link/vergecast), after some housekeeping ([vote for us in the Webby Awards](https://vote.webbyawards.com/PublicVoting#/2026/podcasts/shows/technology), and [come see _Sn …_](https://www.theverge.com/podcast/905524/vergecast-subscribers-movie-night)

[Read the full story at The Verge.](https://www.theverge.com/podcast/906548/best-apple-product-vergecast)

title: (No AI) Chatbots are now prescribing psychiatric drugs
author: Robert Hart
content:
![An illustration of a robot psychiatrist on an orang background](https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/04/STKS524_AI_HEALTH_E.jpg?quality=90&strip=all&crop=0,0,100,100)

Utah is allowing an AI system to prescribe psychiatric drugs without a doctor. It's only the second time the state - and the country - has delegated [this kind](https://commerce.utah.gov/ai/agreements/doctronic/) of clinical authority to AI. State officials say it could bring costs down and ease care shortages, but physicians warn the system is opaque, risky, and unlikely to expand mental health care to those who need it.

The one-year pilot, [announced last week](https://commerce.utah.gov/ai/agreements/ai-legion-health/), will allow Legion Health's AI chatbot to renew certain prescriptions for psychiatric medications, in some cases. The San Francisco startup promises Utah-based patients "fast, simple refills" through a $19-a-month subscription. The prog …

[Read the full story at The Verge.](https://www.theverge.com/ai-artificial-intelligence/906525/ai-chatbot-prescribe-refill-psychiatric-drugs)

The one-year pilot, announced last week, will allow Legion Health's AI chatbot to renew certain prescriptions for psychiatric medications, in some cases. The San Francisco startup promises Utah-based patients "fast, simple refills" through a $19-a-month subscription. The prog …

title: (No AI) OpenAI acquires TBPN

creator: Brian Barrett, Zoë Schiffer, Leah Feiger, Makena Kelly, Kate Knibbs
title: (No AI) ‘Uncanny Valley’: Iran’s Threats on US Tech, Trump’s Plans for Midterms, and Polymarket’s Pop-up Flop
dc:creator: Brian Barrett, Zoë Schiffer, Leah Feiger, Makena Kelly, Kate Knibbs
content: In this episode, we discuss Iran’s threats to target US tech firms, gear up for the midterm elections, and get a scene report from the Polymarket pop-up bar in DC.
contentSnippet: In this episode, we discuss Iran’s threats to target US tech firms, gear up for the midterm elections, and get a scene report from the Polymarket pop-up bar in DC.
